song.title: Wake Up
song.lyrics:
[V1] We have seen the pain That shaped our hearts And in our shame We’re still breathing
[V2] All that You reveal With light in us Will come to life And start breathing
[P] ‘Cause we have seen the hope of Your healing Rising from our souls, is the feeling We are drawing close Your light is shining through
[C] Wake up, wake up, wake up all you sleepers Stand up, stand up, stand up all you dreamers Hands up, hands up, hands up all believers Take up your cross and carry it on
[B] Here we stand Our hearts are Yours Not our will But Yours be done
